top_signals.title: European markets open higher as oil prices hold below $100
top_signals.summary: European stocks opened in positive territory on Wednesday as regional investors assess the latest military operations against Iran.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: US launches ‘self-defense’ strikes against Iran amid ongoing ceasefire
top_signals.summary: The U.S. military conducted military strikes Monday against Iranian missile launch sites and boats it said were attempting to lay mines.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Oil Dips as US Sees Progress in Iran Deal Despite Fresh Tensions
top_signals.summary: Oil dropped on optimism that the US and Iran will reach a peace deal despite fresh hostilities and uncertainty over the vital Strait of Hormuz.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Rebuilding American Manufacturing: A Keystone for Economic Statecraft
top_signals.summary:
Editor’s note: This is the ninth article in an 11-part series examining how the United States should organize, lead, and integrate economic statecraft into strategy, defense practice, and the broader national security ecosystem. The special series is brought to you by the Potomac Institute for Policy Studies and War on the Rocks. Prior installments can be found at the War by Other Ledgers page.In September 2010, after a Chinese fishing trawler captain was detained near the Senkaku Islands, Beijing halted rare-earth exports to Japan. top_signals.title: India boosts drone warfare capability with compact missile
top_signals.summary: Indian Defense Minister Rajnath Singh called the successful development trials a “strategic milestone” toward self-reliance in defense.

top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Chancellor puts regional growth at top of the agenda at UKREiiF
top_signals.summary: UKREiiF brought together investors, developers and local leaders from across the country.

top_signals.title: Japan welcomes Philippines’ Marcos at Imperial Palace
top_signals.summary: President Ferdinand Marcos Jr.'s visit is the first state guest visit to Japan by a Philippine president since 2015.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: 7-Eleven data breach exposes personal information of 185,000 people
top_signals.summary: The ShinyHunters extortion gang stole the personal information of over 183,000 people after hacking the systems of convenience store chain giant 7-Eleven in April, according to data breach notification service Have I Been Pwned. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
